name: dj-music
description: DJ techno library management — MCP server: 20+ tools, audio analysis, set building, render pipeline
author: Evgeny Gurin

args: cd "${AGY_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$PWD}" && set -a && [ -f .env ] && . .env; set +a && exec uv run -- fastmcp run fastmcp.json --no-banner

interface.shortDescription: Build and manage techno DJ sets
